posts.text: America’s grip on popular culture is loosening. Many predicted that globalisation would lead to a stale, worldwide monoculture, where everyone watched and listened to the same things. But new analysis says otherwise: http://econ.st/4v19cqa
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: At Papaya Patch Datacenters, we’ll be using olive oil (in 3-5 years🤷‍♂️) as a high-cost renewable fuel. Losing more money, pushes valuations higher🚀🚀
posts.author: hkuppy
